name: ARCHCODE Default Parameters
description: Model parameters for loop extrusion simulation

_important.note: These are MODEL PARAMETERS, not physical constants
_important.calibration: Calibrated against Hi-C contact maps (Rao et al. 2014) for GM12878
_important.validation: Pearson r >= 0.7 vs experimental Hi-C (not AlphaGenome - currently mock)
_important.timeMapping: Steps are discrete events. Biological time mapping is approximate.
_important.units: Residence time is measured in STEPS for simulation, seconds are approximate

source: Grid search optimization for HBB locus + literature defaults

literature.residenceTime: Gerlich et al. (2006) Cell - ~20 min FRAP
literature.ctcfEfficiency: Rao et al. (2014) Cell - convergent enrichment
literature.ctcfResidence: Hansen et al. (2017) - 1-5 min (not yet implemented)

cohesin.meanResidenceStepsNote: NOT minutes! Steps are discrete simulation events
cohesin.meanResidenceTimeApproxNote: Assumes BIOLOGICAL_TIME_SCALE=1s/step. Real time depends on this mapping.
cohesin.unloadingProbabilityNote: p = 1/meanResidenceSteps. For exponential distribution of residence times.
cohesin.bookmarkingEfficiencyNote: MODEL PARAMETER - no direct literature measurement
cohesin.bookmarkingEfficiencyWarning: Assumed default. Calibrate if experimental loading site data available.

ctcf.convergentBlockingEfficiencySource: Rao et al. (2014) - inferred from Hi-C loop enrichment
ctcf.convergentBlockingEfficiencyWarning: Single-molecule efficiency may differ from population average
ctcf.nonConvergentBlockingEfficiencyNote: Leakiness - some non-convergent pairs still block
ctcf.nonConvergentBlockingEfficiencySource: de Wit et al. (2015) Cell - estimated from loop patterns
ctcf.recognitionDistanceNote: Spatial threshold for CTCF detection by cohesin

simulation.timeStepMsNote: Rendering speed only - does not affect physics
simulation.biologicalTimeScaleNote: TUNABLE PARAMETER - maps steps to real time
simulation.biologicalTimeScaleWarning: This is a model assumption, not physical law. Steps are discrete events.

_limitations.time: Steps are dimensionless discrete events; biological time is approximate mapping
_limitations.stochasticity: Unloading is memoryless (exponential), real cohesin may have non-exponential kinetics
_limitations.blocking: CTCF efficiency is ensemble average; single-molecule behavior may differ
_limitations.alphaGenome: Validation uses mock data, not real AlphaGenome API
